assumptions.fourPilotHeuristic: Pattern treated as 4 pilot when any non-PAX sector duty exceeds 12:00, but SYD/AKL and AKL/SYD sectors are excluded from the extra 4-pilot night-credit assumption, and SYD/PER plus PER/SYD are excluded on patterns containing LHR sectors.
assumptions.governedDeltaRule: Effective delta is governed as max(Applicable Credit, Flight Total + Deadhead Total + qualifying Night/3).
